archimate:ApplicationInterface.name: ePayment
archimate:ApplicationInterface.documentation:
Definition: The ePayment Application service refers to a digital payment solution that enables secure and convenient electronic transactions between buyers and sellers. It encompasses the electronic processing of financial transactions, such as online purchases, bill payments, and fund transfers, using digital payment methods and platforms.
Source: International Journal of Computer Science and Network Security (IJCSNS)
Source reference: https://ijcsns.org/
LOST view: TVA-API Enablers [Motivation]
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/EPaymentApplicationInterface
ABB name: egovera:EPaymentApplicationInterface
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/EPaymentApplicationInterface
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/WebServiceApplicationInterface

properties.value: The ePayment Application service refers to a digital payment solution that enables secure and convenient electronic transactions between buyers and sellers. It encompasses the electronic processing of financial transactions, such as online purchases, bill payments, and fund transfers, using digital payment methods and platforms.
International Journal of Computer Science and Network Security (IJCSNS)
